overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a tropical tribal settlement built over water. The character walks across wooden bridges and through shallow water around a large colorful serpent monument in a lush, sunlit environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway over turquoise river

events.description: character steps off wooden bridge onto grassy riverbank

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across a wooden bridge over a river, approaching a tribal settlement

notable_agents.action: tribal villager standing guard near the bridge exit

entered.detail: weathered wooden walkway with rope railings spanning the river
clear turquoise water flowing beneath the bridge
cascading waterfall in the background mist
dense jungle vegetation surrounding the settlement
decorative wooden posts with blue painted tips

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a weathered wooden bridge spanning a turquoise river, with a waterfall visible in the misty background. Tribal villagers stand guard near the bridge exit as the character transitions onto a grassy riverbank.

events.description: location marker 'FALL'S EDGE' appears indicating settlement entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along a grassy path toward a large colorful serpent monument

entered.detail: massive arching structure made of red and blue painted wood with glowing red accents
tall wooden poles with tribal carvings and colorful decorations

segments.scene_description: Moving along a grassy path, the character approaches a massive serpent monument with red and blue decorations. The wooden bridge falls behind as tribal totem poles rise on the left, and a location marker indicates the settlement entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal village center with shallow water

events.description: character slows to look up at the serpent monument while wading through shallow water

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water and looking around the settlement center, observing the architecture

notable_agents.action: tribal villager walking through the shallow water in the settlement

entered.detail: elaborate wooden buildings built on stilts over the water

segments.scene_description: The character explores the settlement center by wading through shallow turquoise water, circling the massive serpent monument which now dominates the right side of the frame. Tribal huts on stilts and other villagers become visible as the camera pans to take in the surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty river crossing into the heart of a vibrant, water-based tribal settlement. It begins with the character crossing a weathered wooden bridge over a turquoise river, moving past a distant waterfall toward guards stationed on a grassy riverbank. As the character advances along a grassy path, the bridge recedes and tribal totem poles emerge on the left, leading the way toward a massive serpent monument adorned in red and blue. The scene then shifts as the character wades into shallow turquoise water, circling the towering monument while the camera pans to reveal surrounding villagers and huts built on stilts.
